chroma_key.name: green
chroma_key.selection_reason: highest 1st-percentile subject distance among the 2 candidate(s) clearing the 96 erase radius

idle.action: near-static combat idle loop: frame 4 must be a visually identical duplicate of frame 1, with the exact same planted feet, staff orb coordinate, staff length and angle, robe silhouette, guard, hand, cape silhouette, body height, and pose; frame 2 changes only the eyes for one blink, frame 3 changes only the chest by one subtle breathing step; never resize or reposition the weapon

attack.action: readable staff cast: compact windup raising the staff, forward thrust of the spark orb, brief casting hold, recovery toward combat idle; body and staff only, no detached effects

hurt.action: brief impact recoil: flinch backward pulling the staff close, stagger, regain footing, settle toward combat idle; no counterattack and no detached effects

style: match the accepted idle anchor exactly: crisp 16-bit-inspired pixel art, identical proportions, outline weight, detail density, palette, dark navy robe with lightning embroidery, spark-orb staff, silver-grey hair
